profile.title: Profile

profile.email_description: Your email is used for login and notifications.

connections.title: Connected Accounts
connections.subtitle: Link your social accounts for easier sign-in

unlink_modal.title: Unlink account?
unlink_modal.message: Are you sure you want to unlink this account?

why_connect.title: Why connect accounts?
reasons: Sign in faster without typing your password
Access your account even if you forget your password
Keep your account secure with multiple authentication methods

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and account security
security.change_password_description: Choose a strong password that you don't use elsewhere.

fields.name: Workspace name

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.delete_description: Once you delete a workspace, there is no going back. All projects will be deleted.

members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace and their roles

invitation.title: Invite new member
invitation.description: Send an email invitation to collaborate in this workspace.

empty.title: No deleted projects

deleted_projects.no_snapshots: No snapshots available for this project.

recover_modal.title: Recover project?
